Bash(python -c "
import os
os.environ[''DATABASE_URL''] = ''postgresql+psycopg2://eos_user:eos_password@localhost:5432/eos_db''
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, inspect
engine = create_engine\(os.environ[''DATABASE_URL'']\)
insp = inspect\(engine\)
cols = {c[''name'']: c[''type''] for c in insp.get_columns\(''donnees''\) if c[''name''].startswith\(''adresse''\) or c[''name''] == ''ville''}
for name, typ in cols.items\(\):
    print\(f''{name}: {typ}''\)
")

Bash(DATABASE_URL="postgresql+psycopg2://eos_user:eos_password@localhost:5432/eos_db" python -c "
import os
os.environ[''DATABASE_URL''] = ''postgresql+psycopg2://eos_user:eos_password@localhost:5432/eos_db''
from app import create_app, db
from models.models import Donnee
from models.models_enqueteur import DonneeEnqueteur

app = create_app\(\)
with app.app_context\(\):
    # Dump complet donnee_enqueteur pour JACOB VANILLE \(37003\)
    de = DonneeEnqueteur.query.filter_by\(donnee_id=37003\).first\(\)
    if de:
        d = de.to_dict\(\)
        for k, v in d.items\(\):
            if v is not None and v != '''' and v != 0:
                print\(f''  {k} = {v}''\)
    
    print\(\)
    print\(''--- Donnee originale \(donnees table\) ---''\)
    donnee = db.session.get\(Donnee, 37003\)
    dd = donnee.to_dict\(\)
    for k, v in dd.items\(\):
        if v is not None and v != '''' and v != 0 and v != False:
            print\(f''  {k} = {v}''\)
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS confirmation_options \(
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    client_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    option_text VARCHAR\(255\) NOT NULL,
    usage_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0 NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\) NULL,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\) NULL,
    CONSTRAINT uq_confirmation_option UNIQUE \(client_id, option_text\),
    CONSTRAINT fk_confirmation_client FOREIGN KEY \(client_id\) REFERENCES clients\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE
\);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_confirmation_client ON confirmation_options \(client_id\);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_confirmation_option_text ON confirmation_options \(client_id, option_text\);

SELECT 'Table confirmation_options créée avec succès.' AS resultat;
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
-- 1. Enquêtes archivées par client
SELECT c.code, COUNT\(*\) as nb_enquetes
FROM donnees d
JOIN clients c ON d.client_id = c.id
WHERE d.statut_validation = 'archive'
GROUP BY c.code;

-- 2. Fichiers archives liés
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as nb_fichiers_archives FROM enquete_archive_files;

-- 3. Fichiers orphelins \(chemin sans enquête\)
SELECT eaf.id, eaf.filepath, eaf.enquete_id
FROM enquete_archive_files eaf
LEFT JOIN donnees d ON eaf.enquete_id = d.id
WHERE d.id IS NULL;

-- 4. Exports groupés
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as nb_batches, MIN\(created_at\) as premier, MAX\(created_at\) as dernier FROM export_batches;

-- 5. Enquêtes par statut
SELECT statut_validation, COUNT\(*\) as nb
FROM donnees
GROUP BY statut_validation
ORDER BY nb DESC;
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'

-- 1. DOUBLONS sur numeroDossier par client
SELECT '=== DOUBLONS ===' as check;
SELECT client_id, "numeroDossier", COUNT\(*\) as nb
FROM donnees
WHERE "numeroDossier" IS NOT NULL AND est_contestation = false
GROUP BY client_id, "numeroDossier"
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
ORDER BY nb DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Résumé doublons
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as nb_doublons_distincts FROM \(
  SELECT "numeroDossier", client_id
  FROM donnees
  WHERE "numeroDossier" IS NOT NULL AND est_contestation = false
  GROUP BY client_id, "numeroDossier"
  HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
\) sub;

EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'

-- Détail des "doublons" sur numeroDossier="3" pour comprendre
SELECT id, "numeroDossier", nom, prenom, "dateNaissance", statut_validation, created_at
FROM donnees
WHERE client_id=11 AND "numeroDossier"='3' AND est_contestation=false
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 5;

-- Ces courts numéros \(1,2,3...\) sont-ils normaux pour PARTNER ?
SELECT 'Longueur numeroDossier PARTNER' as info,
  LENGTH\("numeroDossier"\) as longueur, COUNT\(*\) as nb
FROM donnees
WHERE client_id=11 AND "numeroDossier" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY LENGTH\("numeroDossier"\)
ORDER BY longueur;

EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'

-- 2. VRAIS doublons : même nom + prénom + dateNaissance + client
SELECT '=== VRAIS DOUBLONS \(même personne\) ===' as check;
SELECT nom, prenom, "dateNaissance", client_id, COUNT\(*\) as nb
FROM donnees
WHERE nom IS NOT NULL AND prenom IS NOT NULL AND "dateNaissance" IS NOT NULL
  AND est_contestation = false
GROUP BY nom, prenom, "dateNaissance", client_id
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
ORDER BY nb DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT COUNT\(*\) as nb_vrais_doublons FROM \(
  SELECT nom, prenom, "dateNaissance", client_id
  FROM donnees
  WHERE nom IS NOT NULL AND prenom IS NOT NULL AND "dateNaissance" IS NOT NULL
    AND est_contestation = false
  GROUP BY nom, prenom, "dateNaissance", client_id
  HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
\) sub;

EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'

-- Ces doublons sont-ils des re-enquêtes légitimes \(dates différentes\) ou de vrais doublons d'import ?
SELECT d.id, d.nom, d.prenom, d."dateNaissance", d."numeroDossier",
       d.statut_validation, d.created_at::date as date_import, f.nom as fichier_source
FROM donnees d
LEFT JOIN fichiers f ON d.fichier_id = f.id
WHERE d.nom='ALTUNTAS' AND d.prenom='HUSEYIN' AND d."dateNaissance"='1984-02-20'
ORDER BY d.id;

-- 3. DONNÉES COUPÉES : vérifier les champs VARCHAR arrivant à leur limite max
SELECT '=== CHAMPS POTENTIELLEMENT COUPÉS ===' as check;
SELECT 'nom' as champ, COUNT\(*\) as nb_a_limite FROM donnees WHERE LENGTH\(nom\) = 255
UNION ALL SELECT 'prenom', COUNT\(*\) FROM donnees WHERE LENGTH\(prenom\) = 255
UNION ALL SELECT 'adresse1', COUNT\(*\) FROM donnees WHERE LENGTH\(adresse1\) = 255
UNION ALL SELECT 'ville', COUNT\(*\) FROM donnees WHERE LENGTH\(ville\) = 50
UNION ALL SELECT 'commentaire', COUNT\(*\) FROM donnees WHERE LENGTH\(commentaire\) = 2000
UNION ALL SELECT 'motifDeContestation', COUNT\(*\) FROM donnees WHERE LENGTH\("motifDeContestation"\) = 1000
UNION ALL SELECT 'memo5 \(enq\)', COUNT\(*\) FROM donnees_enqueteur WHERE LENGTH\(memo5\) = 1000;

EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'

-- 4. ENQUÊTES NÉGATIVES
SELECT '=== ENQUÊTES NÉGATIVES ===' as check;
SELECT de.code_resultat, COUNT\(*\) as nb
FROM donnees_enqueteur de
WHERE de.code_resultat IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY de.code_resultat
ORDER BY nb DESC;

-- 5. VÉRIFICATION CONTENU : quelques exemples de données PARTNER
SELECT '=== EXEMPLES PARTNER ===' as check;
SELECT d."numeroDossier", d.nom, d.prenom, d."dateNaissance",
       de.code_resultat, de.elements_retrouves, de.date_retour
FROM donnees d
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON de.donnee_id = d.id

  AND d.est_contestation = false

LIMIT 5;

-- 6. VÉRIFICATION CONTENU : quelques exemples EOS

SELECT d."numeroDossier", d.nom, d.prenom, d."dateNaissance",
       de.code_resultat, de.elements_retrouves
FROM donnees d
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON de.donnee_id = d.id
WHERE d.client_id = 1 AND de.code_resultat IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.id DESC
LIMIT 5;

EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
-- État actuel de enquete_facturation
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as nb_lignes_facturation FROM enquete_facturation;

-- Combien d'enquêtes archivées n'ont PAS de ligne facturation
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as enquetes_sans_facturation
FROM donnees d
WHERE d.statut_validation = 'archive'
  AND NOT EXISTS \(
    SELECT 1 FROM enquete_facturation ef WHERE ef.donnee_id = d.id
  \);

-- Combien en ont une
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as enquetes_avec_facturation
FROM donnees d
WHERE d.statut_validation = 'archive'
  AND EXISTS \(
    SELECT 1 FROM enquete_facturation ef WHERE ef.donnee_id = d.id
  \);

-- Aperçu des lignes existantes
SELECT ef.*, c.code as client
FROM enquete_facturation ef
JOIN donnees d ON ef.donnee_id = d.id
JOIN clients c ON d.client_id = c.id
LIMIT 5;
EOF)

FROM donnees d
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON de.donnee_id = d.id
WHERE d.statut_validation = 'archive'

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
-- Tarifs client PARTNER
SELECT code_lettre, montant, date_debut, date_fin, actif FROM tarifs_client ORDER BY code_lettre;

-- Vérifier code_resultat des archives
SELECT de.code_resultat, COUNT\(*\) as nb
FROM donnees d
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON de.donnee_id = d.id
WHERE d.statut_validation = 'archive'
GROUP BY de.code_resultat ORDER BY nb DESC;

-- Combien d'archives ont une donnees_enqueteur
SELECT 
  COUNT\(DISTINCT d.id\) as avec_enqueteur,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM donnees WHERE statut_validation='archive'\) - COUNT\(DISTINCT d.id\) as sans_enqueteur
FROM donnees d
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON de.donnee_id = d.id
WHERE d.statut_validation = 'archive';
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
-- Valeurs tarif_applique déjà en base dans donnees_enqueteur pour les archives
SELECT c.code as client, de.tarif_applique, COUNT\(*\) as nb
FROM donnees d
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON de.donnee_id = d.id
JOIN clients c ON d.client_id = c.id
WHERE d.statut_validation = 'archive'
GROUP BY c.code, de.tarif_applique
ORDER BY c.code, nb DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- tarif_lettre sur les donnees PARTNER archivées
SELECT d.tarif_lettre, COUNT\(*\) as nb
FROM donnees d
WHERE d.client_id = 11 AND d.statut_validation = 'archive'
GROUP BY d.tarif_lettre ORDER BY nb DESC;
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
-- Contenu partner_tarif_rules
SELECT * FROM partner_tarif_rules ORDER BY tarif_lettre, request_key LIMIT 20;

-- Contenu partner_case_requests pour comprendre la structure PARTNER
SELECT request_code, found, COUNT\(*\) as nb
FROM partner_case_requests
GROUP BY request_code, found ORDER BY request_code, found;
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
BEGIN;

INSERT INTO enquete_facturation \(
    donnee_id,
    donnee_enqueteur_id,
    client_id,
    tarif_eos_code,
    tarif_eos_montant,
    resultat_eos_montant,
    tarif_enqueteur_code,
    tarif_enqueteur_montant,
    resultat_enqueteur_montant,
    paye,
    created_at,
    updated_at
\)
SELECT
    d.id,
    de.id,
    d.client_id,

    -- Tarif EOS code
    CASE
        WHEN de.code_resultat NOT IN \('P','H','D'\) OR de.code_resultat IS NULL
            THEN 'N'
        WHEN d.client_id = 1  -- EOS
            THEN COALESCE\(NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\), 'N'\)
        WHEN d.client_id = 11 -- PARTNER
            THEN COALESCE\(NULLIF\(TRIM\(d.tarif_lettre\),''\), 'N'\)
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS tarif_eos_code,

    -- Montant base EOS
    CASE
        WHEN de.code_resultat NOT IN \('P','H','D'\) OR de.code_resultat IS NULL
            THEN 0.00
        WHEN d.client_id = 1
            THEN COALESCE\(
                \(SELECT te.montant FROM tarifs_eos te
                 WHERE te.code = NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\)
                   AND te.actif = true LIMIT 1\),
                0.00\)
        WHEN d.client_id = 11
            THEN COALESCE\(
                \(SELECT ptr.amount FROM partner_tarif_rules ptr
                 WHERE ptr.client_id = 11
                   AND ptr.tarif_lettre = NULLIF\(TRIM\(d.tarif_lettre\),''\)
                   AND ptr.request_key = 'ADDRESS'
                 LIMIT 1\),
                0.00\)
        ELSE 0.00
    END AS tarif_eos_montant,

    -- Résultat EOS \(= montant appliqué\)
    CASE
        WHEN de.code_resultat NOT IN \('P','H','D'\) OR de.code_resultat IS NULL
            THEN 0.00
        WHEN d.client_id = 1
            THEN COALESCE\(de.tarif_applique,
                COALESCE\(
                    \(SELECT te.montant FROM tarifs_eos te
                     WHERE te.code = NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\)
                       AND te.actif = true LIMIT 1\),
                    0.00\)\)
        WHEN d.client_id = 11
            THEN COALESCE\(
                \(SELECT ptr.amount FROM partner_tarif_rules ptr
                 WHERE ptr.client_id = 11
                   AND ptr.tarif_lettre = NULLIF\(TRIM\(d.tarif_lettre\),''\)
                   AND ptr.request_key = 'ADDRESS'
                 LIMIT 1\),
                0.00\)
        ELSE 0.00
    END AS resultat_eos_montant,

    -- Tarif enquêteur code \(même logique\)
    CASE
        WHEN de.code_resultat NOT IN \('P','H','D'\) OR de.code_resultat IS NULL
            THEN 'N'
        WHEN d.client_id = 1
            THEN COALESCE\(NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\), 'N'\)
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS tarif_enqueteur_code,

    -- Montant base enquêteur
    CASE
        WHEN de.code_resultat NOT IN \('P','H','D'\) OR de.code_resultat IS NULL
            THEN 0.00
        WHEN d.client_id = 1
            THEN COALESCE\(
                \(SELECT tq.montant FROM tarifs_enqueteur tq
                 WHERE tq.code = NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\)
                   AND tq.enqueteur_id IS NULL
                   AND tq.actif = true LIMIT 1\),
                0.00\)
        ELSE 0.00
    END AS tarif_enqueteur_montant,

    -- Résultat enquêteur
    CASE
        WHEN de.code_resultat NOT IN \('P','H','D'\) OR de.code_resultat IS NULL
            THEN 0.00
        WHEN d.client_id = 1
            THEN COALESCE\(
                \(SELECT tq.montant FROM tarifs_enqueteur tq
                 WHERE tq.code = NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\)
                   AND tq.enqueteur_id IS NULL
                   AND tq.actif = true LIMIT 1\),
                0.00\)
        ELSE 0.00
    END AS resultat_enqueteur_montant,

    false,
    NOW\(\),
    NOW\(\)

FROM donnees d
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON de.donnee_id = d.id
WHERE d.statut_validation = 'archive'
  AND NOT EXISTS \(
      SELECT 1 FROM enquete_facturation ef WHERE ef.donnee_enqueteur_id = de.id
  \);

-- Résultat
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as lignes_inserees FROM enquete_facturation WHERE created_at >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '5 minutes';

COMMIT;
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
-- Résumé global
SELECT
    c.code as client,
    ef.tarif_eos_code,
    COUNT\(*\) as nb_enquetes,
    SUM\(ef.resultat_eos_montant\) as total_facturation_client,
    SUM\(ef.resultat_enqueteur_montant\) as total_remuneration_enqueteur
FROM enquete_facturation ef
JOIN donnees d ON ef.donnee_id = d.id
JOIN clients c ON d.client_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.code, ef.tarif_eos_code
ORDER BY c.code, ef.tarif_eos_code;

-- Totaux globaux
SELECT
    c.code,
    COUNT\(*\) as nb_total,
    SUM\(ef.resultat_eos_montant\) as total_facture,
    SUM\(ef.resultat_enqueteur_montant\) as total_enqueteur
FROM enquete_facturation ef
JOIN donnees d ON ef.donnee_id = d.id
JOIN clients c ON d.client_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.code;
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
-- Corriger les 8 enquêtes PARTNER tarif_lettre B \(tarifs_client B = 75.00\)
UPDATE enquete_facturation ef
SET
    tarif_eos_montant    = tc.montant,
    resultat_eos_montant = tc.montant,
    updated_at           = NOW\(\)
FROM donnees d
JOIN tarifs_client tc ON tc.client_id = d.client_id
                      AND tc.code_lettre = d.tarif_lettre
                      AND tc.actif = true
WHERE ef.donnee_id = d.id
  AND d.client_id = 11
  AND d.tarif_lettre = 'B'
  AND ef.resultat_eos_montant = 0.00
  AND d.statut_validation = 'archive';

SELECT 'Correction B appliquée' as statut, COUNT\(*\) as nb_corriges
FROM enquete_facturation ef
JOIN donnees d ON ef.donnee_id = d.id
WHERE d.client_id = 11 AND d.tarif_lettre = 'B'
  AND ef.resultat_eos_montant > 0;
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
-- Répartition des enquêtes par rapport aux dates de début des tarifs
SELECT
  SUM\(CASE WHEN COALESCE\(d.datedenvoie, d.created_at::date\) < '2025-12-16' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as avant_tarif_eos,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN COALESCE\(d.datedenvoie, d.created_at::date\) >= '2025-12-16'
            AND COALESCE\(d.datedenvoie, d.created_at::date\) < '2025-12-31' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as entre_debut_eos_et_partner,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN COALESCE\(d.datedenvoie, d.created_at::date\) >= '2025-12-31' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as apres_tous_tarifs,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN d.datedenvoie IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as sans_datedenvoie
FROM donnees d
WHERE d.statut_validation = 'archive';
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
BEGIN;

-- Supprimer les lignes créées sans date de référence \(les 14047 + les 3 manuelles\)
-- On garde seulement celles qui avaient paye=true \(aucune ici\)
DELETE FROM enquete_facturation WHERE paye = false;

SELECT 'Lignes supprimées, réinsertion avec dates...' as statut;

INSERT INTO enquete_facturation \(
    donnee_id,
    donnee_enqueteur_id,
    client_id,
    tarif_eos_code,
    tarif_eos_montant,
    resultat_eos_montant,
    tarif_enqueteur_code,
    tarif_enqueteur_montant,
    resultat_enqueteur_montant,
    paye,
    created_at,
    updated_at
\)
SELECT
    d.id,
    de.id,
    d.client_id,

    -- Tarif code EOS/client
    CASE
        WHEN de.code_resultat NOT IN \('P','H','D'\) OR de.code_resultat IS NULL THEN 'N'
        WHEN d.client_id = 1  THEN COALESCE\(NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\), 'N'\)
        WHEN d.client_id = 11 THEN COALESCE\(NULLIF\(TRIM\(d.tarif_lettre\),''\), 'N'\)
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS tarif_eos_code,

    -- Montant base EOS/client avec fallback date
    CASE
        WHEN de.code_resultat NOT IN \('P','H','D'\) OR de.code_resultat IS NULL THEN 0.00
        WHEN d.client_id = 1 THEN COALESCE\(
            -- 1er choix : tarif valide à la date d'envoi
            \(SELECT te.montant FROM tarifs_eos te
             WHERE te.code = NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\)
               AND te.actif = true
               AND te.date_debut <= COALESCE\(d.datedenvoie, d.created_at::date\)
               AND \(te.date_fin IS NULL OR te.date_fin >= COALESCE\(d.datedenvoie, d.created_at::date\)\)
             ORDER BY te.date_debut DESC LIMIT 1\),
            -- Repli : tarif le plus ancien disponible
            \(SELECT te.montant FROM tarifs_eos te
             WHERE te.code = NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\) AND te.actif = true
             ORDER BY te.date_debut ASC LIMIT 1\),
            0.00\)
        WHEN d.client_id = 11 THEN COALESCE\(
            -- partner_tarif_rules \(sans date\)
            \(SELECT ptr.amount FROM partner_tarif_rules ptr
             WHERE ptr.client_id = 11
               AND ptr.tarif_lettre = NULLIF\(TRIM\(d.tarif_lettre\),''\)
               AND ptr.request_key = 'ADDRESS' LIMIT 1\),
            -- Repli tarifs_client avec date d'envoi
            \(SELECT tc.montant FROM tarifs_client tc
             WHERE tc.client_id = 11
               AND tc.code_lettre = NULLIF\(TRIM\(d.tarif_lettre\),''\)
               AND tc.actif = true
               AND tc.date_debut <= COALESCE\(d.datedenvoie, d.created_at::date\)
               AND \(tc.date_fin IS NULL OR tc.date_fin >= COALESCE\(d.datedenvoie, d.created_at::date\)\)
             ORDER BY tc.date_debut DESC LIMIT 1\),
            -- Repli tarifs_client sans date
            \(SELECT tc.montant FROM tarifs_client tc
             WHERE tc.client_id = 11
               AND tc.code_lettre = NULLIF\(TRIM\(d.tarif_lettre\),''\)
               AND tc.actif = true
             ORDER BY tc.date_debut ASC LIMIT 1\),
            0.00\)
        ELSE 0.00
    END AS tarif_eos_montant,

    -- Résultat EOS = tarif_applique si déjà calculé, sinon même logique
    CASE
        WHEN de.code_resultat NOT IN \('P','H','D'\) OR de.code_resultat IS NULL THEN 0.00
        WHEN d.client_id = 1 THEN COALESCE\(de.tarif_applique,
            \(SELECT te.montant FROM tarifs_eos te
             WHERE te.code = NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\) AND te.actif = true
             ORDER BY te.date_debut DESC LIMIT 1\), 0.00\)
        WHEN d.client_id = 11 THEN COALESCE\(
            \(SELECT ptr.amount FROM partner_tarif_rules ptr
             WHERE ptr.client_id = 11
               AND ptr.tarif_lettre = NULLIF\(TRIM\(d.tarif_lettre\),''\)
               AND ptr.request_key = 'ADDRESS' LIMIT 1\),
            \(SELECT tc.montant FROM tarifs_client tc
             WHERE tc.client_id = 11
               AND tc.code_lettre = NULLIF\(TRIM\(d.tarif_lettre\),''\)
               AND tc.actif = true
             ORDER BY tc.date_debut ASC LIMIT 1\),
            0.00\)
        ELSE 0.00
    END AS resultat_eos_montant,

    -- Tarif enquêteur code
    CASE
        WHEN de.code_resultat NOT IN \('P','H','D'\) OR de.code_resultat IS NULL THEN 'N'
        WHEN d.client_id = 1 THEN COALESCE\(NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\), 'N'\)
        ELSE 'N'
    END AS tarif_enqueteur_code,

    -- Montant enquêteur avec fallback date
    CASE
        WHEN de.code_resultat NOT IN \('P','H','D'\) OR de.code_resultat IS NULL THEN 0.00
        WHEN d.client_id = 1 THEN COALESCE\(
            \(SELECT tq.montant FROM tarifs_enqueteur tq
             WHERE tq.code = NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\)
               AND tq.enqueteur_id IS NULL AND tq.actif = true
               AND tq.date_debut <= COALESCE\(d.datedenvoie, d.created_at::date\)
               AND \(tq.date_fin IS NULL OR tq.date_fin >= COALESCE\(d.datedenvoie, d.created_at::date\)\)
             ORDER BY tq.date_debut DESC LIMIT 1\),
            \(SELECT tq.montant FROM tarifs_enqueteur tq
             WHERE tq.code = NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\)
               AND tq.enqueteur_id IS NULL AND tq.actif = true
             ORDER BY tq.date_debut ASC LIMIT 1\),
            0.00\)
        ELSE 0.00
    END AS tarif_enqueteur_montant,

    -- Résultat enquêteur
    CASE
        WHEN de.code_resultat NOT IN \('P','H','D'\) OR de.code_resultat IS NULL THEN 0.00
        WHEN d.client_id = 1 THEN COALESCE\(
            \(SELECT tq.montant FROM tarifs_enqueteur tq
             WHERE tq.code = NULLIF\(TRIM\(de.elements_retrouves\),''\)
               AND tq.enqueteur_id IS NULL AND tq.actif = true
             ORDER BY tq.date_debut ASC LIMIT 1\),
            0.00\)
        ELSE 0.00
    END AS resultat_enqueteur_montant,

    false,
    COALESCE\(d.datedenvoie::timestamp, d.created_at\),
    NOW\(\)

FROM donnees d
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON de.donnee_id = d.id
WHERE d.statut_validation = 'archive'
  AND NOT EXISTS \(
      SELECT 1 FROM enquete_facturation ef WHERE ef.donnee_enqueteur_id = de.id
  \);

SELECT COUNT\(*\) as lignes_inserees FROM enquete_facturation;

COMMIT;
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
-- Champs financiers déjà remplis dans donnees_enqueteur pour les archives
SELECT 
  COUNT\(*\) as total,
  COUNT\(de.tarif_applique\) as avec_tarif_applique,
  COUNT\(de.montant_facture\) as avec_montant_facture,
  COUNT\(de.numero_facture\) as avec_numero_facture,
  COUNT\(de.date_facture\) as avec_date_facture,
  COUNT\(de.cumul_montants_precedents\) as avec_cumul,
  COUNT\(de.reprise_facturation\) as avec_reprise
FROM donnees d
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON de.donnee_id = d.id
WHERE d.statut_validation = 'archive';

-- Aperçu des valeurs par client
SELECT c.code, 
  de.tarif_applique, de.montant_facture, de.numero_facture, de.date_facture,
  COUNT\(*\) as nb
FROM donnees d
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON de.donnee_id = d.id
JOIN clients c ON d.client_id = c.id
WHERE d.statut_validation = 'archive'
GROUP BY c.code, de.tarif_applique, de.montant_facture, de.numero_facture, de.date_facture
ORDER BY c.code, nb DESC
LIMIT 15;
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
-- Valeurs PARTNER dans donnees_enqueteur
SELECT 
  de.tarif_applique, de.montant_facture, de.date_facture,
  de.cumul_montants_precedents, de.reprise_facturation, de.remise_eventuelle,
  COUNT\(*\) as nb
FROM donnees d
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON de.donnee_id = d.id
WHERE d.client_id = 11 AND d.statut_validation = 'archive'
GROUP BY de.tarif_applique, de.montant_facture, de.date_facture,
         de.cumul_montants_precedents, de.reprise_facturation, de.remise_eventuelle
ORDER BY nb DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Et pour EOS avec montant_facture
SELECT 
  de.tarif_applique, de.montant_facture, de.date_facture,
  de.cumul_montants_precedents, de.reprise_facturation,
  COUNT\(*\) as nb
FROM donnees d
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON de.donnee_id = d.id
WHERE d.client_id = 1 AND d.statut_validation = 'archive'
  AND de.montant_facture IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY de.tarif_applique, de.montant_facture, de.date_facture,
         de.cumul_montants_precedents, de.reprise_facturation
ORDER BY nb DESC
LIMIT 10;
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -d eos_db << 'EOF'
-- Résumé final par client
SELECT
    c.code,
    COUNT\(*\) as nb_enquetes,
    SUM\(ef.resultat_eos_montant\)        as total_facture_client,
    SUM\(ef.resultat_enqueteur_montant\)  as total_remuneration_enqueteur,
    COUNT\(CASE WHEN ef.resultat_eos_montant = 0 THEN 1 END\) as nb_negatives_zero
FROM enquete_facturation ef
JOIN donnees d ON ef.donnee_id = d.id
JOIN clients c ON d.client_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.code ORDER BY c.code;

-- Quelques exemples avec date de facturation
SELECT c.code, d."numeroDossier", d.nom, de.code_resultat,
       ef.tarif_eos_code, ef.resultat_eos_montant,
       ef.resultat_enqueteur_montant,
       ef.created_at::date as date_facture
FROM enquete_facturation ef
JOIN donnees d ON ef.donnee_id = d.id
JOIN donnees_enqueteur de ON ef.donnee_enqueteur_id = de.id
JOIN clients c ON d.client_id = c.id
WHERE ef.resultat_eos_montant > 0
ORDER BY ef.created_at
LIMIT 8;
EOF)
